concerns.text: FR-003 (material-level split) and SC-001 (test set metrics) rely on `code/models/train.py`. T020 and T021 are marked complete, but T024 (null model comparison) and T025 (permutation p-values) are incomplete. FR-006 requires permutation p-values for FDR correction (SC-005). Without T025, the FDR correction in T026 has no input, making FR-006 and SC-005 unimplementable.

SC-002 requires validating feature importance against a consensus list. T032 implements this logic but depends on T035 (load_external.py) and T035a (curate dataset). T035a and T035 are marked incomplete. Additionally, T014 (descriptors) is marked complete, but the plan notes `contracts/dataset.schema.yaml` is missing/rejected, preventing validation of the external dataset required for SC-002.

SC-003 requires measuring R² >= 0.60 on a model trained only on top 3 descriptors. T033 implements this logic but is marked complete while T034 (diagnostic report for R² < 0.5) is incomplete. The spec's edge case ('What happens when test set performance is poor') requires a defined failure mode response (diagnostic report) which is missing a task.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires pinned seeds and checksums. T008 (data classes) and T010 (pytest config) are marked incomplete. Without `pytest.ini` and test directory structure, the 'Independent Test' scenarios in the spec cannot be executed or verified, blocking reproducibility.

SC-004 requires measuring pipeline runtime against GitHub Actions limits. T039 (performance optimization/benchmarking) is marked incomplete. There is no task to actually run the pipeline on the runner and record the time, meaning SC-004 has no mechanism for verification.

Phase 3 (External Validation) is required for SC-002 and SC-003. T035a (curate external dataset) is marked incomplete and rejected for missing schema. T035 (load_external.py) is also incomplete. The dependency chain for the scientific validation phase is broken at the first step, making SC-002 and SC-003 impossible to execute.
